title: inula huillensis
intro: Inula huillensis, also known as Angulata, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to the tropical regions of Africa. The medicinal properties of Inula huillensis lie in its roots, which contain inulin, a type of fiber that has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Inula huillensis include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as hypertension and kidney stones. Inula huillensis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
